root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as share_stock , pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atnow(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as loan_bal , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code , (select shr.share_value from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail shr , sc_mem_m_membership_registered mem where shr.membership_no = mem.membership_no and shr.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and shr.item_type = 'WD' and mem.member_status_code = '3' ) as share_wd from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where 1=1 --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '050000' /*WHERE*/

r_tge_member_resign_coll_defect_nest_loa.sql: select sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no)as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no)as member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no)as collateral_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no)as collateral_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'SD MONTH YYYY')as begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = '023808'

r_tge_member_resign_coll_defect_nest_con.sql: select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.membership_no , tab.loan_contract_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no , decode(lag(sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no,1,null)over( order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ,0,1 ) as row_memno , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no)as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no)as member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no)as coll_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no)as coll_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'SD MONTH YYYY')as begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , coll.ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(coll.ref_own_no)as member_ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(coll.ref_own_no)as member_group_ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_contract_coll coll , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = coll.ref_own_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no = '023808' order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no )tab
